reviews.comment:
Ser socio tiene un trato especial siempre pero destaco que fui muy bien atendido. Sin averselo dicho hasta ultimo momento. Muy conforme con el servicio

(Translated by Google)
Being a member always comes with special treatment, but I must emphasize that I received excellent service. I didn't even mention it until the last minute. Very satisfied with the service.

reviews.comment:
El Cofee Shop YPF ACA vende 50% más caro que el resto de los kioskos de la ciudad. Tiene 2 Compresores de Aire para neumáticos de los cuales uno no funciona y el otro no avisa sonoramente cuando se llega a la presión deseada por el usuario. No es culpa de los empleados que atienden bien sino del dueño o administrador.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF ACA Coffee Shop sells 50% more expensively than the rest of the kiosks in the city. It has two tire compressors, one of which doesn't work and the other doesn't sound when the user reaches the desired pressure. This isn't the fault of the employees, who provide good service, but of the owner or manager.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNmRQenFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención de los chicos de playa. YPF  + ACA = estación bien atendida. Un sábado de Enero a las 15 horas el Full estaba cerrado y fue un problema  para mí, y no es que uno estaba en un horario imposible.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the guys at the station was excellent. YPF + ACA = well-run station. One Saturday in January at 3 PM the Full was closed, which was a problem for me, and it wasn't like it was an impossible time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzZ2RuOUpnEAE
